head: 23a7a1ad
note: plan_mode.yaml contains 3 scenarios (not 7 as stated in worker prompt); all 3 were run

vs_past.note: B45 total=3 (yaml only contains 3 scenarios); B42-B44 ran 7 scenarios — direct comparison requires caution

scenarios.notes: Plan ran to completion. 2 router_empty_response_retry_injected events fired. control_ir_failed x2 for index_query op ('NoneType' has no attribute 'base_dir') — non-fatal, plan proceeded. Reply cited both permission-model.md and workspace.md with 5 concrete points and header names.

Plan executed (4 steps completed) but LLM reported that src/reyn/tools/plan.py and src/reyn/chat/planner.py were not found in the repo. The agent did not fabricate code, but also could not satisfy the rubric requiring specific function names from those files. Rubric fail → R. 0 retry events.

Plan ran 4 steps to completion. 3 router_empty_response_retry_injected events fired — one per plan step for steps 1-3 (step 4 ran clean). Reply listed 5 pillars citing principles.md, architecture.md, and workspace.md with specific P-number references. Rubric met → V.

pr287_accumulation.note: B45 W6 shows 5 retry events across 3 plan_mode scenarios (B44 had 3 across an unspecified scenario set). Pattern: retry fires once per plan step in S3 (3/4 steps triggered retry), and 2x in S1. S2 had 0 retries. Continued accumulation supports PR #287 default-flip evidence.
pr287_accumulation.per_scenario_breakdown: S1: 2 retries (plan_step_started x3, retries in 2 of 3 steps), S2: 0 retries (plan ran clean), S3: 3 retries (one per step for steps 1-3)

new_findings.title: plan_mode.yaml scenario count mismatch
new_findings.description: Worker prompt stated 7 scenarios in plan_mode.yaml but the file contains only 3. All 3 were run. Past B42-B44 verdict tables show 7 total — this implies the yaml was likely edited between those batches and now, or past workers combined multiple scenario sets.

new_findings.title: plan_explain_with_code_references consistently R — plan.py/planner.py not found
new_findings.description: S2 plan ran 4 steps successfully but the agent reported src/reyn/tools/plan.py and src/reyn/chat/planner.py as not found. This matches B44 expected outcome (refuted=0.5). The plan infrastructure works but the specific files referenced in the scenario prompt do not exist at HEAD 23a7a1ad. Scenario design may need updating to reference actual existing file paths.

new_findings.title: router_empty_response_retry_injected fires per-plan-step in S3
new_findings.description: S3 shows 3 retry events for 4 plan steps (steps 1-3 each triggered one retry, step 4 clean). S1 shows 2 retries for 3 steps. S2 shows 0. Pattern: retry probability appears correlated with individual plan step execution, not plan overall. B45 W6 total = 5 retry events. Combined with B44's 3 events, evidence for PR #287 default-flip continues to accumulate.

new_findings.title: control_ir_failed index_query in S1 — non-fatal but logged
new_findings.description: S1 emitted 2 control_ir_failed events for index_query kind with error 'NoneType object has no attribute base_dir'. Plan still completed and rubric was met. This suggests the action index is not initialized in this worktree environment but fallback behavior handled gracefully.
